programs.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programs.sub_title: A Life or Death Situation and This is How I'm Going to Die
programs.desc: (M) A teen sneaks out of her home only to find herself attacked by an aggressive dogman. Years after an encounter with Bigfoot, a man comes face-to-face again with the creature.

programs.title: Ghost Loop
programs.desc: (M) The team investigates a woman's claim that an entity pushed her down the stairs in Clear Spring, MD. She suspects a couple from the property's dark past is responsible.
